WHAT_THIS_GAME_IS
Jones in the Fastlane is a pressure-management game about clawing your way out of survival mode. Every cycle you move through the city, spend limited hours, protect your sanity, and decide whether to chase stability, gamble on hustles, or invest in the long climb upward. Burn Rate is the weekly bill you must cover just to stay operational. Debt grows when you miss it. Ambient Stress is the background sanity drain that hits every cycle before your rest re
CORE LOOP

Travel, choose actions, manage credits and sanity, then close the cycle before pressure compounds.

EARLY GAME

You start constrained. Stable labor keeps you alive, hustles cover emergencies, and bad tradeoffs can trap you.

WIN FANTASY

Convert scarcity into leverage. Better jobs, education, and discipline let you control the board instead of reactin...

text:
Completed one bounded Phase 11 slice for Persona A and re-established the authoritative Week 1 baseline from onboarding. The live run secured `Sanitation-T3`, completed `Work Shift x3`, and closed Week 1 at `₡172 / Debt ₡0 / Hunger 20% / Sanity 45%`. I exported the new checkpoint to [week-01-save.json](/home/silwerdivan/code/jones-vibes/docs/workflows/cyberpunk-overhaul/checkpoints/persona_a/week-01-save.json) with metadata at [week-01-meta.json](/home/silwerdivan/code/jones-vibes/docs/workflows/cyberpunk-overhaul/checkpoints/persona_a/week-01-meta.json).

I updated the bounded control surface and workflow records in [run-state.json](/home/silwerdivan/code/jones-vibes/docs/workflows/cyberpunk-overhaul/run-state.json), [current-phase.md](/home/silwerdivan/code/jones-vibes/docs/workflows/cyberpunk-overhaul/current-phase.md), [phase-11-audit-progress.md](/home/silwerdivan/code/jones-vibes/docs/workflows/cyberpunk-overhaul/phase-11-audit-progress.md), [audit-log-persona-a.md](/home/silw...
